name: Shoppers Stop HDFC Bank Credit Card

milestones.label: 500 Reward Points on weekend spends of Rs 15,000 or above at Shoppers Stop (capped once per month, max 5 times a year)
2,000 Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 2 Lakhs or more

joiningBenefits: Rs 500 Shoppers Stop voucher as welcome benefit, redeemable on any transaction at Shoppers Stop store
Complimentary Shoppers Stop Silver Edge membership worth Rs 350
additionalBenefits: Link RuPay Credit Card to UPI for scan-and-pay transactions
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
additionalDetails: Minimum transaction of Rs 150 required to earn reward points
Points expire after 2 years from the date of accumulation

selfEmployed: Annual ITR greater than Rs 6 lakh

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-07
Points value is Rs 1 when redeemed against Shoppers Stop vouchers (1:1), but falls to Rs 0.20 for statement credit or SmartBuy booking.
Minimum transaction of Rs 150 is required to earn reward points.
Shoppers Stop spends reward points capped at 500/month; non-Shoppers Stop spends capped at 1,00,000/month.
